# enum / filter

The **enum** (select) type's `data-view.filter` capability.

Contributes `DataViewSlots.Filter({ match: "enum", ... })` — a multi-select
chip `Control` (one `ToggleChip` per `field.options` entry, toggling membership
of a `selected: string[]`) plus the pure `predicate` / `isActive` applied in the
data-view row pipeline. With no selection the filter is inactive and keeps every
row; otherwise a row matches when its value is among the selected options.

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Enum (select) field type: data-view filter (multi-select option chips).
- Web:
  - Contributes: `DataViewSlots.Filter` "enum"
